title: PipelineConfig
description: Schema for pipeline configuration objects passed to the orchestrator skill (SKL-010). Supports both flat (skills[]) and phased (phases[]) pipeline formats.

version.description: Semver version of this pipeline config.

description.description: Human-readable description of the pipeline's purpose and intended use.

domain.description: Optional domain classifier for specialist pipelines. Enables domain-aware skill routing and constraint injection.

mode.description: Execution mode. sequential runs skills one by one. parallel runs independent groups concurrently. hybrid uses parallel_groups definition.

skills.description: Flat ordered list of skills (simple pipeline format). Use this OR phases[], not both.

phases.description: Ordered list of pipeline phases (structured pipeline format). Use this OR skills[], not both.

label.description: Human-readable phase label shown in progress UIs.

parallel.description: If true, all skills in this phase run concurrently.

condition.description: Expression evaluated before running the phase. Phase is skipped if falsy.

async.description: If true, the phase runs asynchronously (fire-and-forget) and does not block pipeline progression.

note.description: Optional human-readable annotation for this phase. Shown in progress UIs and pipeline documentation.

parallel_groups.description: Groups of skill names that can execute concurrently. Only used when mode is 'parallel' or 'hybrid'.

gates.description: HITL and validation gates that pause or block pipeline progression. If declared, must contain at least one gate — an empty gates array is not schema-valid.

recovery.description: Recovery configuration when a critical failure occurs.

on_critical_failure.description: Skill name to invoke on critical failure (typically 'rollback-manager').

max_repair_iterations.description: Maximum repair loop iterations before aborting.

rollback_scope.description: Scope of rollback when recovery is triggered.

async_skills.description: Names of skills that run asynchronously (fire-and-forget). Must match skill names defined in skills[] or phases[].

on_failure.description: Behavior when a skill fails all retries. halt stops the pipeline. skip continues to next skill. rollback triggers rollback-manager.

full_trace.description: If true, all intermediate artifacts are retained in the pipeline result. Increases token usage significantly.

skill_step.description: A single skill invocation within a pipeline.

name.description: Skill name as registered in skills/index.yaml (e.g. 'requirement-analyzer').

version.description: Semver or semver-range for the skill version. If omitted, latest is used.

inputs.description: Static input overrides for this skill.

skip_validation.description: If true, skips schema validation of this skill's output.

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts before the pipeline halts this step.

async.description: If true, skill runs asynchronously and does not block pipeline progression.

type.description: Execution type. validation_check skills must emit a verdict field (pass/block). A block verdict halts the pipeline.

config.description: Domain-specific configuration passed to the skill invocation (e.g. domain constraints, guard thresholds).

input_overrides.description: Runtime input overrides merged with static inputs before skill execution.

note.description: Optional human-readable annotation for this skill step. Shown in pipeline documentation and trace logs.

gate.description: A gate that pauses or blocks pipeline progression.

after_skill.description: Gate fires after this skill name completes (flat pipeline format).

after_phase.description: Gate fires after this phase ID completes (phases pipeline format).

type.description: Gate enforcement mode. human_approval requires user confirmation. validation_check auto-passes if output is valid. condition evaluates a JS-like expression. auto is an alias for condition.

condition.description: Expression evaluated against prior skill/phase output. Required when type is 'condition' or 'auto'.

timeout.description: Seconds to wait for manual gate approval. 0 = wait indefinitely. Default: 3600.

bypass_on_timeout.description: If true, gate auto-continues when timeout is reached. Defaults to false (safe). Set to true only for non-critical informational gates. MUST be false for deployment gates — enforced by schema when timeout is 0.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the approval request UI.

note.description: Optional human-readable annotation for this gate. Shown in pipeline documentation and approval UIs.
